description_long: This is a Balea branded hand soap bottle with a pump dispenser, featuring a vibrant pink and red color scheme. The front label displays the product name 'Handseife' and 'Cranberry', along with images of cranberries and decorative swirls, suggesting a fruity scent. The bottle is made of translucent plastic, allowing the pink liquid inside to be partially visible. The back of the bottle contains product information, a barcode, and additional branding, all printed on a pink background with white and red accents. The pump mechanism is white and sits atop a screw-on cap, designed for easy dispensing. The overall shape is rectangular with rounded edges, and the bottle holds 500 ml of liquid, as indicated on the label.
description: A pink Balea hand soap bottle with a white pump dispenser, cranberry graphics, and a translucent plastic body showing the liquid inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Balea logo, cranberry graphics, and product name on a pink label.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved bottle shape and the continuation of the pink and white design, with less visible text.
description_view_2: Back view displaying product information, barcode, and a round label with cranberry graphics on a pink background.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bottle's rounded edge and partial visibility of the front label and graphics.
